{"@timestamp":"2026-03-11T14:51:39.941404-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    select
        fwe1_0.id,
        fwe1_0.created_at,
        fwe1_0.event_data,
        fwe1_0.event_type,
        fwe1_0.failure_reason,
        fwe1_0.max_retries,
        fwe1_0.next_retry_at,
        fwe1_0.original_received_at,
        fwe1_0.retry_count,
        fwe1_0.status,
        fwe1_0.stripe_event_id,
        fwe1_0.succeeded_at,
        fwe1_0.tenant_id,
        fwe1_0.updated_at 
    from
        failed_webhook_events fwe1_0 
    where
        fwe1_0.status='PENDING' 
        and fwe1_0.next_retry_at<=? 
    order by
        fwe1_0.next_retry_at 
    fetch
        first ? rows only","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"scheduler-1","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}

        sel1_0.max_retries,
        sel1_0.next_retry_at,
        sel1_0.payload,
        sel1_0.processed_at,
        sel1_0.retry_count,
        sel1_0.status,
        sel1_0.updated_at 
    from
        public.stripe_event_logs sel1_0 
    where
        sel1_0.status=? 
        and sel1_0.next_retry_at is not null 
        and sel1_0.next_retry_at<=localtimestamp 
    order by
        sel1_0.next_retry_at 
    fetch
        first 10 rows only","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"scheduler-2","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
